headline: Tractor Supply Names Gloria Anderson as the Next Headliner for Life Out Here
summary: BRENTWOOD, Tenn., March 05, 2026--Tractor Supply Company (NASDAQ: TSCO), the largest rural lifestyle retailer in the United States, announced today that Gloria Anderson from Luling, Texas, is the winner of its Life Out Here Emerging Artist Program. The Company partnered with multi-platform selling and CMA Award-winning country music artist Cody Johnson for the return of the program, which strives to discover and support emerging country artists who live and love Life Out Here.
